title: psychotria wenzelii
intro: Psychotria wenzelii, also known as Wenzel's Wild Coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Psychotria wenzelii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
